session.user: Run `make fix` from the repository root `/home/runner/work/erk/erk` and then run `make format` and then run `make prettier`. Report all results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report them.
session.assistant: I'll run those commands sequentially and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fix from repository root

session.tool_result:
uv run ruff check --fix --unsafe-fixes Found 1 error (1 fixed, 0 remaining). uv run ruff format 2 files reformatted, 1727 files left unchanged prettier --write '**/*.md' --ignore-path .gitignore [90m.claude/agents/changelog/commit-categorizer.md[39m 147ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/devrun.md[39m 32ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/code-diff-analyzer.md[39m 15ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/documentation-gap-identifier.md[39m 60ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/existing-docs-checker.md[39m 23ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/plan-synthesizer.md[39m 36ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/session-analyzer.md[39m 13ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/tripwire-extractor.md[39m 27ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/libcst-refactor.md[39m 83ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/consolidate-learn-plans.md[39m 20ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/diag-lock-error.md[39m 22ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/diverge-fix.md[39m 19ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/git-pr-push.md[39m 30ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/land.md[39m 20ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/learn.md[39m 67ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/migrate-objective-schema.md[39m 4ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/objective-create.md[39m 46ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/objective-list.md[39m 4ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/objective-plan.md[39m 16ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/objective-update-with-closed-plan.md[39m 13ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/one-shot-plan-only.md[39m 5ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/one-shot.md[39m 7ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/plan-implement.md[39m 34ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/plan-save.md[39m 28ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/pr-address-remote.md[39m 7ms (unchanged)

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make format from repository root

session.tool_result: Exit code 2 make: *** No rule to make target 'format'. Stop.
session.assistant: Let me check what make targets are available:
session.tool_result: make: *** No rule to make target 'help'. Stop.

1→.PHONY: format-check lint prettier prettier-check ty upgrade-ty test py-fast-ci fast-ci all-ci md-check docs-check docs-validate docs-sync-check docs-fix clean publish fix reinstall-erk-tools docs docs-serve docs-deploy exec-reference-check mcp mcp-dev test-erk-mcp docs-v2-build docs-v2-serve pre-push-check install-hooks 2→ 3→prettier: 4→ prettier --write '**/*.md' --ignore-path .gitignore 5→ 6→prettier-check: 7→ prettier --check '**/*.md' --ignore-path .gitignore 8→ 9→format-check: 10→ uv run ruff format --check 11→ 12→lint: 13→ uv run ruff check 14→ 15→fix: 16→ uv run ruff check --fix --unsafe-fixes 17→ uv run ruff format 18→ prettier --write '**/*.md' --ignore-path .gitignore 19→ 20→ty: 21→ uv run ty check 22→ 23→upgrade-ty: 24→ uv remove ty --group dev && uv add --dev ty 25→ 26→# === Package-specific test targets === 27→ 28→test-erk-dev: 29→ cd packages/erk-dev && uv run pytest -n auto 30→
... [181 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant: I see. There is no `make format` target. Let me now run `make prettier`:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make prettier from repository root

session.assistant:
Perfect! Now let me provide a comprehensive summary of the results:
## Summary
**make fix passed:** - Fixed 1 ruff error (unsafe fix applied) - Reformatted 2 Python files using ruff format - Ran prettier on all markdown files (all unchanged)
**make format failed:** - No such target exists in the Makefile
**make prettier passed:** - Ran prettier on all markdown files in the repository - All files already formatted correctly (unchanged)
### Detailed Results:
#### 1. `make fix` Successfully executed with the following components: - **ruff check --fix --unsafe-fixes**: Found 1 error and applied 1 fix (0 remaining) - **ruff format**: Reformatted 2 files, left 1,727 files unchanged - **prettier**: Processed all markdown files with `--ignore-path .gitignore` (all unchanged)
#### 2. `make format` Failed with exit code 2. This target does not exist in the Makefile at `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/Makefile`. Available formatting-related targets are: - `format-check` (checks ruff format without applying fixes) - `fix` (combines ruff check --fix, ruff format, and prettier) - `prettier` (standalone prettier execution) - `prettier-check` (checks prettier without applying fixes)
#### 3. `make prettier` Successfully executed: - Ran prettier with `--write` flag on all markdown files matching `**/*.md` - Applied `.gitignore` exclusions - All markdown files were already properly formatted (marked as "unchanged") - The operation completed without errors
